news.t: AI financing fueling a surge in U.S. convertible bond sales

overview.description: The iShares Convertible Bond ETF (ICVT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund tracks an index of USD-denominated convertible bonds weighted by market value. The index contains only cash-pay convertibles and excludes mandatory and preferred convertibles. ICVT was launched on Jun 2, 2015 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: Bloomberg U.S. Convertible Cash Pay Bond > $250MM Index
